title: oreogrammitis jagoriana
intro: Oreogrammitis jagoriana, also known as Jagor's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis jagoriana include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
